issues.title: Incorrect grouping
issues.problem: The query is grouping by merchant_id instead of customer_id.

issues.title: Missing filter for completed transactions
issues.problem: The query does not filter for completed transactions only.

issues.title: Missing table aliases
issues.problem: The query does not use table aliases, making it harder to read.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the logic.
issues.fix: /* Calculate total transaction amount per customer for completed transactions */

review.corrected_sql:
SELECT t.customer_id, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'
GROUP BY t.customer_id
review.summary: The query had critical correctness issues and could benefit from readability improvements.
